title: Saildrone announces new USV class aimed at anti-submarine warfare
description: Spectre, a new class of unmanned surface vessel, will face sea trials in early 2027.

title: OpenAI Beefs Up ChatGPT’s Image Generation Model
description: The ChatGPT Images 2.0 model is here. Our testing shows it’s better at creating more detailed images and rendering text, but it still struggles with languages other than English.

title: Sam Altman throws shade at Anthropic’s cyber model, Mythos: ‘fear-based marketing’
description: This week, during a podcast appearance, OpenAI CEO Sam Altman called out his competitor's new cybersecurity model, noting that the company was using fear to make its product sound more impressive than it actually is.

title: Mozilla Used Anthropic’s Mythos to Find and Fix 271 Bugs in Firefox
description: The Firefox team doesn’t think emerging AI capabilities will upend cybersecurity long term, but they warn that software developers are likely in for a rocky transition.

title: Anthropic and Status of AI Data Centers
description: Amazon announced an additional $5 billion investment in Anthropic immediately, plus up to $20 billion more in the future (tied to commercial milestones). title: AI Dungeon maker Latitude unveils Voyage, a platform for creating AI-powered RPGs
description: Latitude's new AI-native platform, Voyage, aims to help gamers create their very own role-playing game.

title: NASA to Cover Progress 95 Spacecraft Launch, Docking
description: NASA will provide live coverage of the launch and docking of a Roscosmos cargo spacecraft carrying about three tons of food, fuel, and supplies for the crew aboard the International Space Station. The unpiloted Progress 95 resupply spacecraft is scheduled to launch at 6:21 p.m. EDT on Saturday, Apri

title: Foxconn to manufacture humanoid robots in Vietnam
description: Fushan Technology (Vietnam), a subsidiary of Foxconn (also known as Hon Hai Precision Industry), is seeking permission to manufacture humanoid robots in its factory in Vietnam's northern province of Bac Ninh.

title: SpaceX Falcon 9 Almost Only Rocket for AST Space Mobile, Amazon LEO and Space Force
description: Blue Origin New Glenn is likely grounded for 4 months to investigate the upper stage failure on the weekend. ULA Vulcan is grounded because of two Grumman solid rocket booster failures. title: VisioLab raises $11M Series A to scale AI self-checkout globally
description: VisioLab,a provider of AI-powered visual self-checkout solutions for food service, hasclosed an $11 million Series A financing round. The round was co-led byeCAPITAL Entrepreneurial Partners and Simon...

title: Fervo Energy unveils new power plant details in IPO filing
A Humanoid Robot Set a Half-Marathon Record in China
description: An autonomous robot from the company Honor ran a half marathon in 50:26, beating the human record by 7 minutes.

title: AST Spacemobile BB7 Is Not Recoverable Per ASTS
description: ASTS admits the satellite is too low and cannot be saved. Based on what the orbit appears to be. 20kg of fuel they can only raise it part of the way. title: Siemens and Humanoid test HMND 01 Alpha for logistics tasks
description:
Siemens tested the Humanoid mobile manipulator using NVIDIA simulation and development tools at its electronics factory in Erlangen, Germany.
The post Siemens and Humanoid test HMND 01 Alpha for logistics tasks appeared first on The Robot Report.

title: OpenAI Executive Kevin Weil Is Leaving the Company
description: The former Instagram VP is departing the ChatGPT-maker, which is folding the AI science application he led into Codex.

title: Chef Robotics completes 100M meal servings milestone
description:
Chef Robotics hits 100 million servings, using real-world physical AI to automate high-volume meal production across the globe.
The post Chef Robotics completes 100M meal servings milestone appeared first on The Robot Report.

title: AGIBOT deploys semi-humanoid robots in electronics manufacturing
description:
Longcheer has integrated multiple AGIBOT G2 robots into its tablet production lines, and plans to deploy 100 by Q3 2026. 
The post AGIBOT deploys semi-humanoid robots in electronics manufacturing appeared first on The Robot Report.

title: Self-driving scaleup Wayve raises fresh funds from AMD, Qualcomm and Arm

description:
Rivian is partnering with Redwood Materials, the battery company founded by Tesla co-founder JB Straubel, to build a second-life battery energy storage system at its EV manufacturing plant in Normal, Illinois.

title: Uber begins early test rides of Lucid Gravity robotaxis equipped with Nuro autonomy systems
description:
Level 4 autonomous technology expert Nuro shared the latest milestone of a partnership with Uber Technologies and Lucid Motors to develop a fleet of Gravity Robotaxi SUVs. Per the company, a select group of riders has begun test rides in California.
